description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
Command Example
#
!nmap-scan options="-sV" targets=scanme.nmap.org
Context Example
#
{
"NMAP"
:

outputs.description: Start time epoch. NMAP.Scan.Ended End time epoch.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Started

outputs.description: The command line being used. NMAP.Scan.ScanType The type of discovery scan.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.CommandLine

outputs.description: DNS hostname of scanned host. NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Address Scanned host address.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Hostname

outputs.description: Is the host up or down. NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Services.Port The port of the service.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Status

outputs.description: The protocol of the service. NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Services.State The state of the service.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Services.Protocol

outputs.description: Any captured banner from the service. NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Services.Service The service name.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.Services.Banner

outputs.description: The name of the script used. NMAP.Scan.Hosts.ScriptResults.Output The raw results of the script execution.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.ScriptResults.ID

outputs.description: Additional parseable fields from the script output.
outputs.name: NMAP.Scan.Hosts.ScriptResults.Elements
